description:
Implement `hx-format-date` (T4 Infrastructure) — utility component that formats and displays dates/times using the Intl.DateTimeFormat API with no external dependencies.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-format-date/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-format-date.ts`, `hx-format-date.styles.ts`, `hx-format-date.stories.ts`, `hx-format-date.test.ts`

**Props:** `date` (string|number|Date), `lang` (string — BCP 47 locale, defaults to document.documentElement.lang or navigator.language), `month` (`narrow`|`short`|`long`|`numeric`|`2-digit`), `year` (`numeric`|`2-digit`), `day` (`numeric`|`2-digit`), `weekday` (`narrow`|`short`|`long`), `hour` (`numeric`|`2-digit`), `minute` (`numeric`|`2-digit`), `second` (`numeric`|`2-digit`), `time-zone-name` (`short`|`long`), `time-zone` (IANA string), `hour-format` (`auto`|`12`|`24`), `numeric` (`always`|`auto` — for relative time), `relative` (boolean — show "2 hours ago" style)

**Slots:** none (output only)

**ARIA:** Renders as inline `<time datetime="[ISO date]">` element with formatted text content. The `datetime` attribute provides machine-readable value; visible text is the formatted display.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (date parsing, locale formatting, relative time, datetime attribute), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with various locales + relative time, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-format-date — T4 Date/Time Formatter Utility
